title: Rbaird
compiled_truth: Rbaird is an external contact at [Vinson & Elkins](companies/vinson-elkins). Over the corpus period (1999-05-12 to 2001-07-04), Rbaird sent 9 and received 59 emails, totalling 68 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (6), [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (4), [Nora Dobin](people/nora-dobin) (4), [Rrogers](people/rrogers) (4), [Jarmogi](people/jarmogi) (4).
